blocks.text: Match preview: England face India in 3rd ODI (ODI) on Sun, 19 Jul, 2026, 3:30 pm at Lord's London. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Seam-friendly English conditions; overcast skies assist swing bowlers.
Overcast · High 22°C / Low 13°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 14 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
